understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time; if a level had multiple '+' tiles, all of them needed to be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and progress, ultimately winning the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Moves were executed either by directional actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece, or by CLICKing a grid coordinate to select/teleport/place a piece to that target if the destination was legal. Walls/obstacles prevented movement or placement, and attempts to move/place into blocked tiles resulted in no position change while still consuming a step; selection determined which piece would respond to subsequent actions.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time; if a level had multiple '+' tiles, all of them needed to be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and progress, ultimately winning the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Moves were executed either by directional actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece, or by CLICKing a grid coordinate to select/teleport/place a piece to that target if the destination was legal. Walls/obstacles prevented movement or placement, and attempts to move/place into blocked tiles resulted in no position change while still consuming a step; selection determined which piece would respond to subsequent actions.
